data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of skipping individual occurrences, but the evidence provided does not confirm this capability. The linked use case specifies that the homeowner can skip specific dates without losing the subscription, but there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate this functionality in action. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result of confirming the requirement or capturing a gap was not achieved.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the ability to skip individual occurrences as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to skip individual occurrences.
